user.title: Skippo — Select region
user.description: Choose the AIS region to track vessels in.

vessel.title: Add vessel
vessel.description: Enter the MMSI number or Skippo vessel ID to track. {added} vessel(s) added so far.

data.force_add: Add anyway — vessel may currently be offline

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Skippo
reconfigure.description: Change the AIS tracking region. All tracked vessels will be re-checked in the new region.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Skippo API — check your network connection
error.vessel_not_found: Vessel not found in the selected region. Check the ID or tick 'Add anyway' if the vessel is currently offline.
error.vessel_already_added: This vessel is already being tracked

abort.reconfigure_successful: Region updated — Skippo will reload with the new region

data.force_add: Add anyway — vessel may currently be offline

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Adjust how often Skippo polls the AIS API.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch vessel positions (30–3600 seconds). Lower values give more live data but increase API traffic.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Skippo API
error.vessel_not_found: Vessel not found in the selected region. Check the ID or tick 'Add anyway' if the vessel is currently offline.
error.vessel_already_added: This vessel is already being tracked
